details: Shares 4 of top 10 pharma customers with Rialto portfolio company BioReach Therapeutics. Both sell into oncology clinical operations.
3 Helix engineers previously at Rialto portfolio company GenomeBridge. No non-compete concerns but signals talent pool overlap.
Minimal overlap with existing portfolio. Diagnostic imaging is a new vertical for Rialto. Complementary to VitalSign Dx remote monitoring.
3 of 8 deployed health systems are also customers of Rialto portfolio company CareStack. Potential cross-sell opportunity.
Remote patient monitoring market overlaps with Rialto portfolio company TeleCare Health. Different modality (wearable vs. app-based) limits direct competition.
UnitedHealth Group RPM pilot overlaps with TeleCare Health's existing UHG contract. Need to assess channel conflict risk.
Agricultural carbon credits is a new vertical for Rialto. No existing portfolio overlap. Clean entry point.
Team is agriculture-native. No overlap with existing Rialto climate portfolio which is energy-focused.
Significant overlap with Rialto portfolio company SolarFlow in distributed energy. GridShift is downstream (aggregation) while SolarFlow is upstream (installation).
4 of 12 utility partners also contract with SolarFlow. Potential synergy rather than conflict — complementary offerings.
DAC is a new category for Rialto. No existing carbon removal investments. Would be first pure-play CDR bet.
Highly specialized electrochemistry team. No talent overlap with existing portfolio.
B2B payments competes in adjacent segment to Rialto portfolio company PayStream (SMB payments). NovaPay targets mid-market, PayStream targets micro-merchants.
Limited customer overlap due to different segments. 2 shared enterprise customers identified in manufacturing vertical.
NovaPay CTO previously VP Eng at PayStream (2020-2022). Several engineers also ex-PayStream. Cultural familiarity could ease co-investment dynamics.
Embedded accounting is greenfield for Rialto. No existing fintech infrastructure plays in accounting. Good portfolio diversification.
3 of 22 beta platform partners are also customers of Rialto portfolio companies. Potential warm intros for expansion.
